b:section.name: If you have any Question about Theme Contact us ( Instagram - @helpergd_yt )

div.expr:style: "background-image: url(\"" + data:sourceUrl + "\"); " + "background-position: " + data:backgroundPositionStyleStr + "; " + data:widthStyleStr + "min-height: " + data:height + "_height: " + data:height + "background-repeat: no-repeat; "

b:widget-settings.b:widget-setting:
Every tool you need to work with PDFs in one place

Every tool you need to use PDFs, at your fingertips. All are 100% FREE and easy to use! Merge, split, compress, convert, rotate, unlock and watermark PDFs with just a few clicks.

Merge PDF

Combine PDFs in the order you want with the easiest PDF merger available.

Split PDF

Separate one page or a whole set for easy conversion into independent PDF files.

Compress PDF

Reduce file size while optimizing for maximal PDF quality.

PDF to Word

Easily convert your PDF files into editable DOC and DOCX documents.

PDF to PowerPoint

Turn your PDF files into easy to edit PPT and PPTX slideshows.

PDF to Excel

Pull data straight from PDFs into Excel spreadsheets in seconds.

Word to PDF

Make DOC and DOCX files easy to read by converting them to PDF.

PowerPoint to PDF

Make PPT and PPTX slideshows easy to view by converting to PDF.

Excel to PDF

Make Excel spreadsheets easy to read by converting them to PDF.

Edit PDF

Add text, images, shapes or freehand annotations to your PDF documents.

PDF to JPG

Convert each PDF page into a JPG or extract all images contained in a PDF.

JPG to PDF

Convert JPG images to PDF in seconds. Easily adjust orientation and margins.

Sign PDF

Sign yourself or request electronic signatures from others.

Watermark

Stamp an image or text over your PDF in seconds. Choose typography, transparency, and position.

Rotate PDF

Rotate your PDFs the way you need them. You can even rotate multiple PDFs at once!

HTML to PDF

Convert webpages in HTML to PDF. Copy and paste the URL and convert it with a click.

Unlock PDF

Remove PDF password security, giving you the freedom to use your PDFs as you want.

Protect PDF

Encrypt PDF files with a password to prevent unauthorized access.

Organize PDF

Sort or delete pages in your PDF file, or add new ones at your convenience.

PDF to PDF/A

Transform your PDF to PDF/A for long-term archiving with preserved formatting.

Repair PDF

Repair a damaged PDF and recover data from corrupt files.

Page numbers

Add page numbers to PDFs easily. Choose your position, typography, and margin.

Scan to PDF

Capture document scans from your mobile and send them directly to your browser.

OCR PDF

Easily convert scanned PDFs into searchable and editable documents.

Compare PDF

Show a side-by-side document comparison and highlight file changes.
